title: Azure Resource Manager | SonarQube Cloud Documentation
content:
# Azure Resource Manager

## [Language-specific properties](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/azure-resource-manager/#language-specific-properties "Language-specific properties")

Discover and update Azure Resource Manger-specific [properties](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/analysis-parameters/ "properties") by navigating to: *Project* **Administration** > **General Settings** > **Languages** > **AzureResourceManager**

## [Related pages](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/advanced-setup/languages/azure-resource-manager/#related-pages "Related pages")

- [AzureResourceManager rules](https://rules.sonarsource.com/azureresourcemanager/ "AzureResourceManager rules") for static code analysis
